claim_boundary: The route proves only canonical generation and review for the declared finite universe; downstream execution and broad confidence remain separate.

closure_rules.scope: current target revision and declared route only

forbidden_shortcuts.summary: Do not create a SkillGuard-owned alternate execution route.
Do not convert configured booleans, generated JSON, or progress into native pass evidence.
Do not skip required stages, checks, receipts, or blockers.

integration_claim_boundary: SkillGuard gates the target-native FlowGuard route; it does not execute a parallel controller or replace native model/test evidence.

native_route_bindings.source: FlowGuard canonical route registry and target contract source

not_parallel_route_proof.evidence_source: Canonical route registry, contract source, and may_define_* false gates
not_parallel_route_proof.summary: SkillGuard only validates the FlowGuard-owned route and cannot define an alternate successful execution path.

phases.summary: Identify the declaring owner, model scope, finite boundary, claim scope, and required consumers.
Inventory dimensions, seeds, axes/groups, coverage universe, exclusions, oracles, child receipts, and backfeed.
Generate stable mutation/combination cases, feedback fields, shards, receipts, and composite acceptances.
Run contract-exhaustion tests and reject missing universe items, incomplete oracles, stale receipts, or unmapped misses.
Project case/obligation/cell/shard/receipt/risk ids to typed consumers without claiming downstream pass.

quality_floors.summary: Prompt prose, progress, or generated records cannot replace native evidence.
Missing, stale, skipped, scoped, progress-only, or pass-with-gaps evidence cannot support broad closure.

required_evidence.source: FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact
FlowGuard native command receipt or direct target artifact

route_inventory.summary: Generate canonical finite-boundary cases, oracles, Cartesian combinations, shards, receipts, and typed consumers.

do_not_use_when: The boundary is undeclared or unbounded, the task is test execution, or another route's semantic ownership would be duplicated.
routes.summary: Generate canonical finite-boundary cases, oracles, Cartesian combinations, shards, receipts, and typed consumers.

runtime_lock_policy.applies_when: The flowguard-contract-exhaustion-mesh skill is selected or delegated.
runtime_lock_policy.summary: The target-local contract, route, stage order, checks, evidence, and coverage matrix gate closure.

source_requirements.summary: Every case must derive from an owner-declared finite dimension, seed, axis/group, or universe item.
Generated matrix readiness cannot be reported as MTA, TestMesh, ModelMesh, or risk-ledger closure.
Required cases need actionable oracles and current shards/receipts/backfeed mappings for the claimed scope.
Accept declared finite dimensions/seeds; generate reviewable cases with oracles; block unbounded broad claims, missing feedback, stale/incomplete receipts, or missing universe items; hand o.
Route id: contract_exhaustion_mesh; role: public_owner; native owner: contract_exhaustion_mesh. This standalone FlowGuard satellite skill owns canonical finite-case generation.
Use for same-class, payload, transition, state-closure, PPA, BCL, parent/child closure, no-delta, or model-scoped Cartesian coverage.
The target section 'Use When' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Broad/full claims require a complete ContractCoverageUniverse; reject/block/repair cases require actionable oracle feedback.
Edit .skillguard/contract-source.json, then regenerate derived contracts; SkillGuard checks this native generator contract and cannot synthesize passing downstream evidence.
The target section 'Hard Gates' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Matrix ready is not whole-chain ready; current composite handoff acceptance and template harvest closure remain required where applicable.
Return evidence, failures, blockers, skipped_checks, residual_risk, claim_boundary, and typed_next_actions, plus canonical cases, gaps, shards, and receipts.
Verify the real FlowGuard check engine and AGENTS.md managed record; never create a fake mini-framework.
The target skill description must be represented in the contract: Use to generate canonical bad cases, Cartesian combinations, oracles, coverage shards, and receipts from a declared finite.
The target skill entrypoint and hard gates must be represented by the runtime contract.
Turn an owner-declared finite boundary into canonical mutation/combination cases and typed evidence handoffs; never act as a global bug oracle.
Declared hard gates and required workflow steps must be represented by checks and closure blockers.
Do not invent a boundary from prose, run tests, replace sibling routes, or claim all bugs are covered; return unclear ownership to model-first-function-flow.
The target section 'Do Not Use When' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
The target section 'Output Requirements' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
Build a ContractExhaustionPlan, run review_contract_exhaustion(), and repair oracle, feedback, matrix, receipt, and backfeed gaps.
Identify the declaring owner, finite dimensions/seeds, model scope, universe, exclusions, and required consumers.
Project stable case ids to Model-Test Alignment, TestMesh, ModelMesh, DevelopmentProcessFlow, and Risk Evidence Ledger.
The target section 'Required Workflow' must be represented by route, check, evidence, or closure coverage.
